title: melica minuta var. saxatilis
intro: Melica minuta var. saxatilis, also known as mountain melick or saxatilis melic grass, is a variety of the Melica minuta plant, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Melica minuta var. saxatilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis and other respiratory issues.
